creator: hselasky@c2i.net
text:
On Tuesday 13 March 2012 21:03:52 Jan Beich wrote:
> Hans Petter Selasky <hselasky@c2i.net> writes:
> > The match rule for "subsystem" should be "DEVICE" and not interface.
> > Dump the USB device descriptor using usbconfig and make a rule matching
> > those fields.

Hi,

> 
> Why? webcamd seems to have more than one tablet driver compiled in.

I was simply replying too quickly there. The interface approach is the best.

Patch committed to the I4B repository as r2249:

svn --username anonsvn --password anonsvn \
      checkout svn://svn.turbocat.net/i4b/trunk/ports

Will be part of next Webcamd release. Or if that delays, Koop can maybe import 
those patches separately.


Thanks for your patch!

--HPS
